name: western-bolognese
input: a plate of spaghetti bolognese with ground beef, tomato sauce, and a sprinkle of parmesan
notes: USDA composite: 100g dry spaghetti ~360 kcal, 100g ground beef 80/20 ~250 kcal, 100g tomato sauce ~30 kcal, 10g parmesan ~40 kcal. Advisory tier — beef:sauce ratio drives macro variance.
